# Moussa Salman

> Self-taught Dutch-Egyptian contemporary artist (b. 1952, Egypt) based in Amsterdam, Netherlands. Known for vivid mixed-media abstract paintings built around intersecting black lines — "finding beauty in chaos." Work was born from his daughter Amal's journey with Epidermolysis Bullosa.

## What is available
- Original paintings for sale and on commission (guide prices €8,100–€34,000 by size).
- Signed, certified limited-edition archival museum prints on cotton canvas, in six sizes from 40 cm to 140 cm. Each edition is retired once sold and never reprinted.
- Worldwide enquiries; free worldwide shipping.
